description: Used to detect differentially expressed genes between pairs of branches.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.DetectDifferentiallyExpressedGenes GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.DetectDifferentiallyExpressedGenes is a GenePattern module that Used to detect differentially expressed genes between pairs of branches.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: data.file, output.filename, num.genes, cutoff.zscore, percentile.expr, cutoff.logfc
- Optional: figure.width, flag.use.precomputed, figure.height, root, preference

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/diffex_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <figure.width> <figure.height> <root> <preference> <cutoff.zscore>  <percentile.expr> <flag.use.precomputed> <cutoff.logfc> <num.genes> -n_jobs <job.cpuCount>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_diffex\:0.10

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing gene expression data

parameters.name: flag.use.precomputed
parameters.description: If True, the previously computed scaled gene expression will be used.

parameters.name: num.genes
parameters.description: The number of genes to plot.

parameters.name: preference
parameters.description: The preference of nodes. The branch with speficied nodes are preferred and will be dealt with first. The higher ranks the node have, The earlier the branch with tha node will be analyzed.  This will help generate the consistent results as shown in subway map and stream plot. Comma delimited eg S3,S4

parameters.name: cutoff.zscore
parameters.description: The z-score cutoff used for Mann - Whitney U test.

parameters.name: percentile.expr
parameters.description: Between 0 and 100. Between 0 and 100. Specify the percentile of gene expression greater than 0 to filter out some extreme gene expressions.

parameters.name: cutoff.logfc
parameters.description: The log-transformed fold change cutoff between a pair of branches.
